formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear Professional Association Membership Committee,

I am writing to apply for a Corporate Membership with your esteemed organization. My name is Mason Lee, and I currently work as a Front Office Manager at Luxury Resorts. With a Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality Management and a Certified Hospitality Supervisor certification, I have 4 years of experience in the hospitality industry.

I am eager to become a member of your association to network with industry professionals, stay updated on the latest trends and developments, and access valuable resources to further my professional growth. Being a Corporate Member for a duration of 2 years would allow me to fully engage with the association's offerings and contribute positively to the community.

My commitment to advancing in the hospitality field, continuous learning, and dedication to excellence aligns perfectly with the values of your organization. I believe that my experience and qualifications make me a strong candidate for membership, and I am excited about the opportunity to connect with other like-minded professionals in the industry.

I have included my contact information below for your reference:

Full Name: Mason Lee
Email Address: mason.lee@yahoo.com
Phone Number: 555-4568
Date of Birth: 1994/08/20
Highest Education Level: Bachelor's Degree
Field of Study: Hospitality Management
Professional Certifications: Certified Hospitality Supervisor
Current Employer: Luxury Resorts
Job Title: Front Office Manager
Years of Experience: 4
Industry: Hospitality

I have also provided a reference, David Green, who can attest to my professional qualifications and character. David can be reached at david.green@yahoo.com and has worked with me in the capacity of a manager.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of becoming a member of your association and contributing to its mission and vision.

Sincerely,

Mason Lee
